Admiral David Glasgow Farragut Monument Madison Square Park - This monument impressed me at first glance with its dignity and location in the pleasant surroundings of Madison Square Park. The statue looks majestic and at the same time blends naturally between green spaces, park benches and everyday city life. I like that it is not only a historical object, but also a quiet place for a short break during a walk. You can sit down here, relax and reflect on history for a moment, while modern New York pulsates all around. I particularly appreciate that the monument does not seem overly touristy, which keeps the whole place a pleasant and authentic atmosphere.
